title: Hold in hands
description: This resource pack adds first-person hands that hold items, enhancing immersion by allowing players to see their character's hands holding tools, weapons, and other objects in Minecraft.
body:
![First-Person Hands Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a167de1eb228ae004d85141ca0d04ddf223456b.jpeg)
✨ Add Realism to Your Minecraft! ✨

Now you can see how your character holds items in their hands! This resource pack adds first-person hand animations for all items in Minecraft, starting from version 1.12.2 - 1.21.10 and above.

🔹 What Makes This Resource Pack Unique?

Realistic hands that hold every item as intended.

Full integration with any textures and mods. (I recommend x16 for tools)

🔹 Why Should You Try It?
If you want to immerse yourself in Minecraft with a new level of depth, this resource pack is exactly what you need! Now you can feel like a true hero holding a sword, shovel, or pickaxe.

🔹 How to Install?
Simply download the resource pack, move it to the resourcepacks folder, enable it in the game settings — and enjoy a new level of immersion!
